intentSynonyms: get a workflow run count in retool
look up a workflow run count in retool
fetch a single workflow run count in retool
view one specific workflow run count in retool
get workflow run count in retool
get total run counts per workflow in retool
description: Get the total execution count for every workflow. Returns a map of workflow ID to run count. Useful for identifying active vs dormant workflows and monitoring workflow health.
